name: chemicaljs
description: Easily create your own web proxy with no experience required.
author: Nebelung

scripts.build: bun run build-uv && rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --format esm --target node --sourcemap external && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.cjs --format cjs --target node --sourcemap external && bunx tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.cts
